name: The Out-of-Scope Introspection
effect: Identify a systemic problem that falls outside the current engagement boundary. This card is considered insightful.

clauses.name: BOUNDARY CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If the problem identified is real but undeniably out of scope: It is acknowledged, documented, and set aside.

clauses.name: FOLLOW-ON EFFECT
clauses.rule: If this card survives to the next phase: A separate workstream is proposed to address it at additional cost.

clauses.name: FORGETFULNESS OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If no follow-on engagement is approved: The insight is considered parked indefinitely.

witness_quote: Great point. Not for this sprint.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Was the boundary drawn before or after the problem appeared?
